大小单双老师带.【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-238980296_63507758<br>vk.com/topic-238973706_63507764<br>vk.com/topic-238973487_64611556<br>vk.com/topic-238833146_63507774<br>vk.com/topic-239000271_64826639<br>vk.com/topic-238948468_63678553<br>vk.com/topic-238948536_63507779<br>vk.com/topic-238898537_64611509<br>vk.com/topic-239000252_63769346<br>vk.com/topic-239000233_63371924<br>vk.com/topic-238932578_63678682<br>vk.com/topic-239000244_63156088<br>vk.com/topic-239000251_64826648<br>vk.com/topic-238855697_64611470<br>vk.com/topic-239000311_64826654<br>vk.com/topic-238976012_63769496<br>vk.com/topic-238899352_63769362<br>vk.com/topic-238981250_64254500<br>vk.com/topic-239000240_64254505<br>vk.com/topic-239000235_63070832<br>vk.com/topic-238898537_64611587<br>vk.com/topic-238981894_63156125<br>vk.com/topic-239000260_64254532<br>vk.com/topic-239000268_63678606<br>vk.com/topic-239000249_63952601<br>vk.com/topic-238863255_63070869<br>vk.com/topic-238917192_63769417<br>vk.com/topic-238945029_63952721<br>vk.com/topic-238932578_63678750<br>vk.com/topic-239000302_63769419<br>vk.com/topic-238898537_64611616<br>vk.com/topic-238940157_64611629<br>vk.com/topic-239000262_63769451<br>vk.com/topi
